person.quote: "The only thing that is doing the thing is doing the thing."

shared.current_roles: I currently work as QA Team Lead at Efectivo / Humanit Group, run Consulting Wojciech Bajer, and recently co-founded Lexense.ai where I serve as Co-founder and CTO.

qa-lead.label: QA Lead
qa-lead.intro: I am applying for the ${role} position at ${company}. ${current_roles}
qa-lead.body: My work combines leadership and execution. I define QA strategy, test architecture, release readiness, and cross-team quality processes, while still working directly with tooling, CI/CD, observability, and automation. I have led ecosystem-level QA initiatives, introduced reporting and monitoring workflows with Grafana, Datadog, and ReportPortal, and supported product, engineering, and commercial teams with structured quality ownership.
qa-lead.closing: I would bring to ${company} a hands-on QA lead profile that can set direction, support teams operationally, and improve quality at both the process and implementation level.

qa-automation.label: QA Automation Engineer / SDET
qa-automation.intro: I am applying for the ${role} position at ${company}. My background combines quality engineering, automation, DevOps, and cross-functional product work across web, cloud, mobile, and hardware-connected systems.
qa-automation.body: At Efectivo / Humanit Group I built end-to-end automation for product and ecosystem workflows, created verification scripts for Hardware-in-the-Loop testing, and worked closely with frontend, backend, mobile, and hardware teams to define test strategy and automation direction. I approach automation as an engineering discipline, not just a testing task. That means building reliable frameworks, integrating them into CI/CD, improving signal quality, and keeping test suites maintainable as products evolve.
qa-automation.closing: I would be glad to bring that mix of practical automation experience, systems thinking, and product collaboration to ${company}.

devops-platform.label: DevOps / Platform Engineer
devops-platform.intro: I am applying for the ${role} position at ${company}. Alongside my current QA leadership role, I have hands-on experience building CI/CD infrastructure, improving developer workflows, and supporting delivery platforms in environments that require reliability, visibility, and collaboration across teams.
devops-platform.body: In consulting work for Polestar and Volvo Cars, I worked on CI/CD workflows, Azure DevOps- and GitHub-based delivery pipelines, containerization, Kubernetes-based deployment workflows, and engineering enablement. I also built Grafana-based release visibility and logging solutions that helped teams understand delivery status across services. What I bring is a pragmatic platform mindset: reduce friction for engineers, improve release confidence, automate repeated work, and make systems observable enough to support fast, informed decisions.
devops-platform.closing: I would welcome the opportunity to contribute that blend of platform engineering, automation, and operational clarity at ${company}.

applied-ai.label: Applied AI Engineer
applied-ai.intro: I am applying for the ${role} position at ${company}. My work combines AI-native product engineering, backend system design, and hands-on delivery across product systems and internal engineering workflows, with a focus on moving from problem definition to architecture and production implementation.
applied-ai.body: At Lexense.ai I architected an AI-native legal platform across mobile, web, extension, backend, and knowledge services, designing the system around Node.js / NestJS, OpenAI, RAG, OCR, document analysis, and conversational workflows, with self-hosted infrastructure, observability, CI/CD, and secure handling of sensitive data. At Efectivo / Humanit Group I designed LLM-powered agents for test automation and built LLM + RAG documentation and knowledge workflows to improve how engineers test, troubleshoot, and access product knowledge.
applied-ai.closing: I would bring to ${company} a pragmatic applied AI profile: identify where AI or automation creates real value, design the system end to end, and help teams adopt AI-assisted development workflows with the right balance of speed, reliability, and maintainability.
